company.name: Amaris Consulting
company.description: Amaris Consulting is an independent technology and management consulting firm and a wholly-owned brand of the Mantu group. Founded in Geneva in 2007 by two engineers, a lawyer and a financial expert, Amaris helps businesses grow through expert advisory, project delivery, and technology enablement across Life Sciences, Information Systems & Digital, Telecom, and Engineering.

registration.registry: Commercial Registry of the Canton of Geneva

businessLines.name: Life Sciences
businessLines.description: Advisory and project delivery across pharma, biotech, and medical devices — from R&D and clinical operations to regulatory compliance and manufacturing.

businessLines.name: Information Systems & Digital
businessLines.description: Digital transformation, software engineering, data, cloud, and cybersecurity programmes that modernise the enterprise technology stack.

businessLines.name: Telecom
businessLines.description: Network engineering, deployment, and optimisation services for telecom operators and equipment vendors.

businessLines.name: Engineering
businessLines.description: Multi-sector engineering consulting spanning industrialisation, systems engineering, and product development.

longDescription: Founded in 2007, Amaris Consulting is a leading management and technology consulting firm based in Switzerland. The company is headquartered in Geneva and has a presence in over 60 countries worldwide. With a strong focus on assisting clients in navigating digital transformations, Amaris offers a wide range of services and solutions. Amaris Consulting provides expertise across various industries, including healthcare, finance, telecommunications, and transportation. Their services encompass strategy and management consulting, IT consulting, technology development and integration, change management, and digital transformation. They work closely with clients to offer tailored and innovative solutions to their specific business needs. Operating on a global scale, Amaris Consulting has established several noteworthy subsidiaries and developed key partnerships. One such partnership is with Marlink, a global provider of satellite communications solutions. Together, they support the maritime industry by delivering cutting-edge technology and solutions for onboard connectivity. Amaris also collaborates with leading technology providers, such as Microsoft and Salesforce, to deliver high-quality services to their clients. In terms of market position, Amaris Consulting has experienced significant growth and has become a well-recognized player in the management and technology consulting sector. Their commitment to excellence and client satisfaction has earned them a strong reputation. While specific sales figures are not publicly available, their global presence and extensive client base indicate their success in the market. Recent achievements include being recognized as a Great Place to Work in several countries and receiving numerous industry awards for their innovative solutions. These accolades highlight the firm's dedication to its employees and the quality of its services. As of the latest update, Amaris Consulting continues to expand its global footprint. They are actively hiring new talent and consistently updating their service offerings to meet evolving market demands. The company remains committed to delivering exceptional consulting services and driving digital transformations for their clients across the globe.
